/cwe/weakness/708.Name: Incorrect Ownership Assignment
/cwe/weakness/708.Description: The product assigns an owner to a resource, but the owner is outside of the intended control sphere.
/cwe/weakness/708.ExtendedDescription: This may allow the resource to be manipulated by actors outside of the intended control sphere.

ModesOfIntroduction.Note: REALIZATION: This weakness is caused during implementation of an architectural security tactic.

CommonConsequences.Note: An attacker could read and modify data for which they do not have permissions to access directly.

PotentialMitigations.Description: Periodically review the privileges and their owners.
Use automated tools to check for privilege settings.
